games.description: Games, prototypes, and other game-related projects I have worked on over the past few years.

content.title: Wizdoku
content.tech: Unity 2D, GitHub, Aseprite, C#
content.details: This is a prototype puzzle game I worked on as part of a group project Game Development class. During this project, I acted as asset lead, helping guide the overall vision of the game through conceptualization and asset production and implementation. I also helped create the basic AI for the opponent.
points: 2D puzzle game prototype featuring retro art style
Basic enemy AI strategy (place tile) and tile effects

content.title: The Dungeon Under Chicago
content.tech: Unity 2D, GitHub, Aseprite, C#
content.details: This is a prototype rouge-like I worked on as part of a group project Game Development class. During this project, I acted as project lead, helping guide the overall vision of the game through conceptualization and asset production using Aseprite to create and animate sprites. I also helped with some scripting behaviors and incorporation of level design.
points: 2D rouge-like prototype featuring retro art style
Basic enemy AI scripting behaviors (shooting projectiles, follow player)

content.title: Door Pickers
content.tech: GDScript, Adobe Illustrator, Godot
content.details: A point-and-click roguelike dungeon crawler that will test your mettle. Descend to the 15th floor of the dungeon and best the mighty Minotaur! Originally made with Godot in one week for Brackeys Game Jam 11. This game has received updates since the original jam submission.

content.title: Nuke the Storm
content.tech: GDScript, Adobe Illustrator, Godot
content.details: A strategic tower defense game about defending the USA from waves of unrelenting hurricanes.

content.title: Dragonscale
content.tech: GDScript, Adobe Illustrator, Godot
content.details: A challenging platformer about returning a dragon's lost scale. Lead our daring protagonist Durg on this adventure! Produced with my GameJam group for the 2023 GitHub Game Off.
points: Original textured and animated characters and UI assets

content.title: Tigers & T-34s
content.tech: TBS, Board Game, Historically Accurate
content.details: Turn-based Strategy game featuring well-known tanks from the Battle of Kursk in World War II. I was the Lead Gameplay Designer, handling majority of the gameplay development, balancing, and card design. Also managed the accuracy of all historical references within the game.

content.title: Of the Endless Sea
content.tech: RPG, Board Game, Game Design
content.details: Space vikings Tabletop RPG Game designed and developed by me and my Game Design II group. On top of being the main designer and developer of gameplay, I also designed and balanced all playable classes and sub-classes, weapons, techniques, spells, and more.
points: Tabletop RPG game designed and developed from the ground up
Fully original universe, lore, characters, and classes

content.title: Abaddon
content.tech: Unity 3D, Unity HDRP Render Pipeline, Perforce Version Control, Confluence (Documentation), C#
content.details: This is a senior capstone project hosted by the ArtCenter College of Design in California which I had the opportunity to work on in Spring 2022. As a programmer, my job was to create different dialogue systems using Unity's scriptable objects and coroutines. There were 3 different types of dialogue to implement: Ambient- triggered by walking up to NPCs and LERPing opacity, Tutorial- triggered by game events, and repeats until a specific condition is met, and Conversational- dialogue that creates a back-and-forth character interaction with different dialogue choices.
points: Acted as developer on a senior capstone project
Ambient Dialouge- triggered by walking up to NPCs and LERPing opacity
Tutorial Dialogue- triggered by game events, and repeats until a specific condition is met
Conversational Dialogue- dialogue that creates a back-and-forth character interaction with different dialogue choices.

webApps.description: Web applications, websites, and web games I have worked on over the past few years.

content.title: Appunti Italiani - API
content.tech: HTML, CSS, Bulma CSS, JavaScript, NodeJS, GitHub, Heroku, Circle CI
content.details: This is an API and web application I created with a friend for my Rich Media Applications II class. It is a simple API that uses Node JS to get vocabulary words and definititions from a list of terms for users to post to a central vocabulary study list. It is certainly a project that I would like to expand upon at some point due to my interest in Italian language.
points: Web application using Node JS and frontend languages
Simple API that lets users make a list of vocabulary words

content.title: Snake Evolution
content.tech: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Local Storage
content.details: I Collaborated with a partner to create a self-evolving Snake game using neural networks and a genetic algorithm. It uses neural networks and a genetic algorithm to produce artificially intelligent snakes that will attempt to navigate their boards, eat food, and avoid walls. Various parameters can be adjusted to change the way the simulation works. Additionally, you can save the neural networks you create to your computer to share around or use later!
points: Generate genetic algorithms to train artifically intelligent snakes
Allows the storage and upload of achieved algorithms

content.title: Pokémon TCG Card Finder
content.tech: HTML, HTML Canvas, CSS, Bulma CSS, JavaScript, Local Storage, MatterJS, GitHub
content.details: This is a project I worked on for my Rich Media Applications I class. I created a search engine for Pokémon cards using the offical Pokémon API. It is fully styled with Bulma, and utilizes custom DOM, local storage, cloud storage, and web components for full functionality.
points: Web application and search engine using frontend languages and frameworks
Allows both the storing and purchasing of Pokémon cards

content.title: International S.T.E.M. Academy
content.tech: HTML, CSS, BootStrap, Angular, JavaScript, React.js, GitHub
content.details: Professional project during my time at International S.T.E.M. Academy as a Front End Web Developer. Designed and developed the website's frontend with a focus on user experience using HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, Angular, React.js, and JavaScript. Partnered with a cross-functional team, including designers and product managers, to deliver a user-centric and mobile-friendly website, ensuring seamless navigation and accessibility.
points: Customer-facing web application using frontend languages and frameworks

content.title: Fuel Economy ML Dashboard
content.tech: Python, Numpy, Pandas, SQL, Cloud.plotly
content.details: This project analyzes over 36,000 vehicles from the U.S. Department of Energy fuel economy dataset to understand and predict vehicle efficiency, emissions, and characteristics using both supervised and unsupervised learning. We built and evaluated Ridge Regression, KNN, Logistic Regression, and K-Means models to predict combined MPG, vehicle year, eco-friendliness, and uncover efficiency-based vehicle groupings, achieving strong performance across tasks (e.g., R² ≈ 0.94–0.98 and ROC AUC up to 0.96).
points: Analyzed a large U.S. Department of Energy vehicle dataset (36k+ cars)
Built and evaluated multiple machine learning models (Ridge Regression, KNN, Logistic Regression, K-Means)
Achieved strong performance across tasks (e.g., R² ≈ 0.94–0.98 and ROC AUC up to 0.96)
